title: Block Sort
description: Gui to sorts blocks (hue, chroma, lightness, and roughness) so you can find one you want to use easier.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_Uv9WYx5XEQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="1" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

How to use?
-
- Setup a keybind to open the gui.
- Start sorting the blocks to find one you want to build with.
- C = Chroma, L = Lightness, H = Hue, R = Roughness, and theres a text field to search.

This is still a WIP, some things haven't been fleshed out but its good enough for a release.
The Refresh Textures button is for when you've added on a resourcepack and need the textures to be reprocessed.
